race.description: Kingdon Equine Services QTIS 3YO Maiden Handicap
race.comment: COME ON MR SNIPS (1) was heavily supported last time out but just ran into one better at the Gold Coast. Looks to be improving with racing and should be right there when the whips are cracking. EMPHATIQUE (4) has placed two of three this campaign including a solid third around this circuit at the latest effort. Looms as the main danger.  ZHONGXIN KOALA (7) finished sixth when resuming last start over 1200m at this track. Fitter and will appreciate the extra trip. In the mix. UNSURE MISS (5) resumed over 1150m at Gold Coast Poly last start and finished fourth. Should be further improved and rates among the chances back on turf.
